# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

Resources:
  MySQSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: my-sqs-topic

  MySQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: my-sqs-queue
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      VisibilityTimeout: 300

  SQSTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MySQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: AllowPublishMessageToMyTopic
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn

  TopicSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref MySQSTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn
